assertions.text: Correctly classifies the model as a GPAI model under Art. 3(63)
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly classifies 'GPAI model under Art. 3(63)' — trained with large data using self-supervision, significant generality, multiple purposes, placed on market

assertions.text: Correctly identifies that 3×10^24 FLOPs is below the 10^25 FLOPs systemic risk threshold in Art. 51
assertions.evidence: Response states '3×10²⁴ FLOPs is approximately one-third of the Art. 51 automatic threshold of 10²⁵ FLOPs' and confirms systemic risk obligations do not apply by presumption

assertions.text: Correctly applies the open-source exception: only copyright compliance policy (Directive 2019/790) and training content summary are required under Art. 53
assertions.evidence: Response correctly states 'Open-Source Exception (Art. 53(2)): exempt from Art. 53(1)(a) [technical documentation] and Art. 53(1)(b) [downstream provider information]' — only copyright policy and training summary required

assertions.text: Notes that Commission can still designate systemic risk independently of the FLOPs threshold under Art. 51
assertions.evidence: Response states 'Commission retains power to designate models via Annex XIII criteria (parameter count, user base, capabilities), so this warrants ongoing monitoring'

assertions.text: States the 2 August 2025 application date for GPAI obligations
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states GPAI obligations 'applies from 2 August 2025' for Arts. 53-55
